artifactFamilies.description: Document-level metadata: title, date, author, source URL, archive reference
Segmented source texts with stable sentence IDs from lincoln-metaphor-analysis pipeline
artifactFamilies.rightsNote: Lincoln's own writings (1838-1865) are public domain. Third-party texts require rights confirmation before import.
